python - <<'PY'
import asyncio
from types import SimpleNamespace
from src.features.admin_chat.admin_chat_cog import AdminChatCog

class FakeServerConfig:
    def get_enabled_servers(self, require_write=False):
        return [{'guild_id': 1, 'enabled': True, 'write_enabled': True}]

class FakeAuthor:
    def __init__(self, user_id):
        self.id = user_id
        self.bot = False

class FakeMessage:
    def __init__(self, message_id, author_id, channel, guild):
        self.id = message_id
        self.author = FakeAuthor(author_id)
        self.channel = channel
        self.guild = guild
        self.content = 'message'

class FakeChannel:
    def __init__(self, channel_id, guild, messages):
        self.id = channel_id
        self.guild = guild
        self._messages = list(messages)
    def history(self, limit=100, after=None, oldest_first=False):
        after_id = getattr(after, 'id', None)
        items = [m for m in self._messages if after_id is None or m.id > after_id]
        items.sort(key=lambda m: m.id, reverse=not oldest_first)
        items = items[:limit]
        async def iterator():
            for item in items:
                yield item
        return iterator()

class FakeDB:
    def __init__(self):
        self.server_config = FakeServerConfig()
        self.intents = {
            'intent-history': {
                'intent_id': 'intent-history',
                'guild_id': 1,
                'channel_id': 77,
                'recipient_user_id': 42,
                'status': 'awaiting_confirmation',
                'prompt_message_id': 1000,
                'last_scanned_message_id': None,
                'final_payment_id': 'pay-pending',
            },
            'intent-missing': {
                'intent_id': 'intent-missing',
                'guild_id': 1,
                'channel_id': 99,
                'recipient_user_id': 88,
                'status': 'awaiting_wallet',
                'prompt_message_id': 2000,
                'last_scanned_message_id': None,
            },
            'intent-test': {
                'intent_id': 'intent-test',
                'guild_id': 1,
                'channel_id': 77,
                'recipient_user_id': 42,
                'status': 'awaiting_test',
                'test_payment_id': 'pay-test',
            },
            'intent-final': {
                'intent_id': 'intent-final',
                'guild_id': 1,
                'channel_id': 77,
                'recipient_user_id': 42,
                'status': 'confirmed',
                'final_payment_id': 'pay-final',
            },
        }
        self.updates = []
    def list_active_intents(self, guild_id):
        return [dict(intent) for intent in self.intents.values() if intent['guild_id'] == guild_id]
    def get_admin_payment_intent(self, intent_id, guild_id):
        intent = self.intents.get(intent_id)
        if not intent or intent['guild_id'] != guild_id:
            return None
        return dict(intent)
    def update_admin_payment_intent(self, intent_id, payload, guild_id):
        intent = self.intents[intent_id]
        assert intent['guild_id'] == guild_id
        intent.update(payload)
        self.updates.append((intent_id, dict(payload), guild_id))
        return dict(intent)
    def get_payment_request(self, payment_id, guild_id=None):
        payments = {
            'pay-pending': {'payment_id': 'pay-pending', 'producer': 'admin_chat', 'guild_id': 1, 'status': 'queued'},
            'pay-test': {'payment_id': 'pay-test', 'producer': 'admin_chat', 'guild_id': 1, 'status': 'confirmed', 'is_test': True, 'metadata': {'intent_id': 'intent-test'}},
            'pay-final': {'payment_id': 'pay-final', 'producer': 'admin_chat', 'guild_id': 1, 'status': 'confirmed', 'is_test': False, 'metadata': {'intent_id': 'intent-final'}},
        }
        return payments.get(payment_id)

class FakeBot:
    def __init__(self, channel):
        self._channel = channel
        self.wait_calls = 0
        self.guilds = [channel.guild]
        self.payment_service = object()
    async def wait_until_ready(self):
        self.wait_calls += 1
    def get_channel(self, channel_id):
        return self._channel if channel_id == self._channel.id else None
    async def fetch_channel(self, channel_id):
        return self._channel if channel_id == self._channel.id else None

async def main():
    guild = SimpleNamespace(id=1)
    channel = FakeChannel(77, guild, [])
    messages = [FakeMessage(message_id, 42, channel, guild) for message_id in range(1001, 1206)]
    channel._messages = messages

    db = FakeDB()
    bot = FakeBot(channel)
    cog = AdminChatCog(bot, db, sharer=object())

    replayed = []
    terminal_handoffs = []

    async def fake_check(message):
        replayed.append(message.id)
        return True
    async def fake_handle(payment):
        terminal_handoffs.append(payment['payment_id'])

    cog._check_pending_payment_reply = fake_check
    cog.handle_payment_result = fake_handle

    await cog.cog_load()

    assert bot.wait_calls == 1
    assert replayed == list(range(1001, 1201))
    assert db.intents['intent-history']['last_scanned_message_id'] == 1200
    assert terminal_handoffs == ['pay-test', 'pay-final']

asyncio.run(main())
